description_long: This is a vintage cast iron oven with ornate detailing on its doors and legs, giving it a classic, antique appearance. The oven features a large main door with an oval decorative motif and a smaller adjacent door, both with raised relief patterns. The top surface is flat and robust, suitable for placing pots or pans, and the oven stands on four curved, claw-foot legs. The interior is visible through the open door, revealing a compartment with a shelf and some objects inside, including a rock and a round item. The oven's exterior is predominantly dark, with a matte finish and subtle metallic sheen. There are no visible electronic controls, and the handles are integrated into the door design.
description: A vintage cast iron oven with ornate doors, claw-foot legs, and a flat top, finished in dark matte metal. The oven has decorative reliefs and an openable main compartment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the oven door open, revealing the interior compartment and shelf with objects inside.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both ornate doors with raised oval motifs and the symmetrical design of the oven's facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the main and smaller doors closed, highlighting the detailed relief work and the oven's sturdy legs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, panelled back with no openings or decorative features, emphasizing the oven's solid construction.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel; the oven appears to be manually operated with no electronic or mechanical controls present on the exterior.
attribute_door_handle_type: Integrated horizontal handle, cast as part of the door with a protruding grip, matching the ornate style and material of the oven.
